name: Shine ¬∞вАҐ¬∞ Stuck on Earth
description:
You find an alien squeezing into your fridge because the Earth's environment is too hot for him.

How did he get into your house, and why did he make a mess of your kitchen?

His NSFW Picture is on Patreon only.
